_comment: Built-in utility metadata. Name, description, supported platforms, and arguments for each utility.

utilities.name: git-status
utilities.description: Scan directories for git repos and show a color-coded status summary

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Directory to scan (defaults to current directory)

flags.name: depth
flags.description: How many levels deep to scan for repos (default: 1)

utilities.name: clone
utilities.description: Clone a git repo and auto-install dependencies using the detected package manager

arguments.name: directory
arguments.description: Target directory name (defaults to repo name)

utilities.name: git-push
utilities.description: Safer git push: shows what will be pushed, confirms before pushing, and protects main/master
